channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer, 11th April
item.description:
The fridge freezer is on the pavement and the doors are facing upwards which is dangerous if kids got in it they couldn't get out.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on edge of roundabout, 11th April
item.description:
General litter piling up on edge of roundabout on that corner and surrounding area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crittall's Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and mess! Needs attention, 11th April
item.description:
Flytipping and mess! Needs attention

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Graffiti, 11th April
item.description:
Problems with graffiti in garage block.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Lane, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lennard Road BR3 has a 20mph zone., 11th April
item.description:
Re https://fix.bromley.gov.uk/report/7477958 (text below) I made nearly a year ago and per attached picture no 30mph sign has appeared. Picture shows pole and back of 20mph sign marking the start of the 20mph zone. The picture also shows a ‘suitable’ street light column for the 30mph sign so potentially you don’t even need to put in a new post for this sign. Kindly action promptly. Lennard Road BR3 has a 20mph zone. I think the end of this is outside approx. house number 181. There is a 20mph sign for those entering the zone but there is no 30mph for those exiting the zone. Where ever the end of the boundary is there needs 30mph signs. I don’t think I’m blind! https://fix.bromley.gov.uk/report/7477958

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue bin wasn’t emptied, 11th April
item.description:
Blue bin was not emptied, everyone else’s bin was done, it’s full to the brim. 9 hawksmoor close.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawksmoor Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 11th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Dead rat on street, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Ferris Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Paving stones opposite Guy's hospital main entrance are broken, 11th April
item.description:
As a visitor to the hospital, I don't know the details, what I do know is that the paving slabs in the pavement opposite the hospital are hazardous. My 81 year old mother tripped and fell due to the slabs sticking up at an angle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Maze Pond, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of tagging on various bits of street furniture, 11th April
item.description:
Please clean - looks unappealing and ugly and bad for small businesses.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rosendale Road SE24 at Hawarden Grove junction, 11th April
item.description:
Rosendale Road SE24 at Hawarden Grove junction (south side) is a zebra crossing – centre island Keep Left board graffiti tagged on said zebra crossing. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosendale Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage blockage on public side, 11th April
item.description:
There is a blockage on the public side which is affecting the flow of water of the water drainage on private property. This issue has now become quite severe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Width Restriction Missing, 11th April
item.description:
The width restriction outside The Corner Pin pub is missing. The bollard is actually laying in the pub car park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Slade Green Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin completely overflowing, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Bethwin Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping on Webb Street, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Webb Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Brockwell Park SE24 graffiti – you might have to forward to th, 11th April
item.description:
Brockwell Park SE24 – you might have to forward to the Parks Dept. Just inside Norwood Road / Rosendale Road junction gate is a ‘Welcome to Brockwell Park’ sign board – enamel type sign. Said sign graffiti tagged. Can see said sign re Google Streetview link: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4484988,-0.1021824,3a,28y,259.26h,86.38t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sTCqUUB0XtmpwWFm5-fvMtQ!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D3.619002325520114%26panoid%3DTCqUUB0XtmpwWFm5-fvMtQ%26yaw%3D259.2633704635612!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDQwOC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste dumped, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falmouth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
